target_outcome: Find skill-discovery tools AND skill-audit tools
why_now: Both discovery and audit capabilities are needed for a growing agent ecosystem, and keeping lanes separate prevents false-positive mixing.

does: discovers multiple candidates across two distinct lanes
records source families and raw signals per lane
keeps discovery and audit candidates in separate pools
does_not: does not recommend, approve, install, enable, configure, publish, deploy, login, execute, or mutate runtime config for capabilities
does not perform source, safety, permission, maintenance, credential, browser, provider, live, or external-write audit
does not rank candidates across lanes

source_gaps: Install counts are uneven across registries.
Some hosted indexes expose pages but not stable APIs.
No candidate was installed or executed in this bounded run.
GitHub API does not expose true 7/30/90-day star velocity.

false_positives.name: GitHub prompt-library topic
false_positives.why_false_positive: Returns prompt collections rather than traceable skill-discovery workflows.
false_positives.query_correction: Add registry, marketplace, SKILL.md, or candidate pool terms.

false_positives.name: AgriciDaniel/claude-ads
false_positives.why_false_positive: High-star Claude skill with audit language, but it audits advertising accounts, not candidate skills.
false_positives.query_correction: Require candidate object terms such as SKILL.md, agent skill, skill package, or quality gate.

candidates.name: agentspace-so find-skills

notes: Find-stage artifact does not prove fit for use.

candidates.name: skills.sh registry
candidates.target_outcome: Find tools for discovering skills across registries

candidates.name: moonrunnerkc/skillcheck
candidates.target_outcome: Find tools for auditing skill quality and safety

recent_growth_proxy.summary: Exact outcome match with recent push, but weak distribution signal.

find_signals: Description explicitly targets SKILL.md quality gates.
Mentions Claude Code, VS Code/Copilot, Codex, and Cursor compatibility.
Includes progressive disclosure and token-budget language aligned with skill-audit concerns.

claims.cross_agent_compatibility: Claude Code, VS Code/Copilot, Codex, Cursor
claims.quality_gate_features: frontmatter validation, discoverability checks, file reference validation, token budget checks

verified.cross_agent_compatibility: claimed in README, not independently verified
verified.quality_gate_features: claimed in README, not independently verified

notes: Exact GitHub hit in this bounded run.
Find-stage records the candidate and raw review-surface signals only.

candidates.name: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
candidates.target_outcome: Find tools for auditing skill quality and safety

recent_growth_proxy.summary: Large high-growth-looking security scanner signal with direct AI agent skill object.

candidates.false_positive_note: Adjacent: security scanner, not quality/effectiveness evaluator.

Not treated as a replacement for exact skill-quality review candidates.
